meta.purpose: Small-batch PL Athlete Research continuation for the 2026 Numata Bench Press roster.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-event current rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.
meta.auditReason: Continuation after Lot 66-68 audit. This run checks the remaining Lot 69-70 names from the prior Lot 66-70 scope without mutating athlete data or print layout.

batchScope.openPrCheck: One open PR (#111) was present. It is a standalone completion report generator and does not edit athlete data, candidate data, or the A4 print layout, so this isolated audit log is non-overlapping.
batchScope.writeScope: Research audit log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.
